ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code of the customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the service */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the call */,
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call type */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the call in minutes */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge for the call */,
  "call_start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the call */,
  "call_end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the call */,
  "call_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the call (incoming or outgoing) */,
  "destination_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the call's destination */,
  "call_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the call */,
  "call_transcription" TEXT /* Transcription of the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_type_id") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the call type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call type */,
  "rate_code" TEXT /* Rate code for the call type */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the call type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who the bill belongs to */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "total_charge" REAL /* Total charge for the bill */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the bill must be paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the bill */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee applied to the bill */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_items" (
  "bill_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill item */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the item belongs to */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call the item is for */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge for the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the bill item */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_items_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_items_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_reps" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer service representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the representative was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the representative belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_calls" (
  "service_call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer service call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the call */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative who handled the call */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date the call was made */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue the customer called about */,
  "call_duration" REAL /* Duration of the customer service call in minutes */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the call */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Whether a follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_calls_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("rep_id") REFERENCES customer_service_reps ("rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_calls_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vmail_messages" (
  "vmail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voicemail message */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who the message is for */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was left */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the voicemail message in seconds */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the message has been read */,
  "transcription" TEXT /* Transcription of the voicemail message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vmail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vmail_messages_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call type the rate is for */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate for the call type */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the rate is effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date until which the rate is effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_call_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_type_id") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "monthly_rate" REAL /* Monthly rate for the plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit included in the plan (in MB/GB) */,
  "sms_limit" INTEGER /* SMS limit included in the plan */,
  "rollover_policy" TEXT /* Whether unused minutes, data, or SMS roll over to the next billing cycle */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Early termination fee for the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_plans" (
  "customer_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer plan */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who chose the plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan chosen */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan (if applicable) */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the plan */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Next billing date for the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plans_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
